overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its reorganization meeting, electing new officers and approving a $5,000 grant for the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission learned that a competing hot air balloon event in Marshfield was cancelled, making Taste and Glow the sole balloon event in the area.

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
Work product transmittals, educational presentations and reports
New business - Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: Trustee Erling was nominated and elected as Chair. Cushing was nominated for Vice Chair by motion, seconded by Jackson, and approved. Renee was nominated and elected as Secretary. All elections passed unanimously without opposition.
The minutes from April 21st were approved. Motion was seconded by Renee and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Grant Request - Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill from 3308 Green Pastures Lane presented on behalf of Taste and Glow Balloonfest. He reported last year's attendance was estimated at 11,000-12,000 people and announced that a competing Marshfield balloon event was cancelled due to permit issues. A commissioner noted the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year and requested better tracking of hotel room usage for future decisions. The commission approved a $5,000 grant matching last year's amount, with a request for improved hotel usage data in their post-event report. Motion passed unanimously.

Renee reported on attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar, where she met the candidates and the winner Anastasia. She noted the candidates toured Marathon County locations including Mullen's Cheese and were impressed with the community. This was the first time the event was hosted in Marathon County since the 1970s.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant for Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Taste and Glow representatives to provide hotel room usage data in post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM
title: Tourism Commission
